entries.name: The Crossing — ~8 million New Yorkers torn into Hethrun in one black second; what did it, and is there a way home?
Find your people — brother Akhil and your ~50 (none in this coffle), scattered across a realm at war; finding them needs a city, news, and leverage
Drift-marked, and known for it — you kept your class (a skilled professional in Hethrun); valuable and notable, a thing these powers may want owned or used rather than hanged
Conflated with Ranulf's marauders — taken roped among Stonebay raiders; that taint colors what every lord here takes you to be

Three powers, one hall — Count Edmund (host, Aurea-backed, poised), Count Halfdan (captor, deep-north-backed, poised), and a Crown delegation (the Regency) — rival claims on the captives and on the war
A knife in Hollowford (Turning Point) — Aldwin's deadly 'turn' two days past reeks of foul play; someone in the Count's own house moved on his blood, and they are not finished
Sworn man of Count Edmund — fealty given (a worthy purpose, and a gilded bond); now of the Hollowford March, in tension with finding his people, the Crossing, and his own freedom
The leaderless March — Edmund stricken, heir Wystan far away & shadowed, boy-regent Aldwin holding Hollowford on Shake's arm, Captain Garmund resentful — and a war 2 days out

The line cut down — Edmund stricken, heir Wystan murdered in a Brackenford ambush that reeks of a trap; Aldwin is the last of the Count's blood and surely the next target; a hidden hand is decapitating the Hollowford line

The gates shut on his own — Aldwin (steered by Garmund, over Shake) drove out Hollowford's own refugee-tenants before the Ash-Captain's host; hundreds cast out & scattering the plague; the March's faith broken, the boy-lord bloodied, Shake's counsel beaten this round

THE RELIEF RIDE (new spine) — Shake broke out of Hollowford to forge a relief army: rally the scattered vassal-thanes & leaderless field-host, court Count Halfdan's horse and/or the Crown's blessing, and return in 2-3 months to break the Ash-Captain's siege when his host is winter-and-plague-weak

A following gathering at Aldersweir — Shake's cast-out Hollowford folk heeded his call and stream south to the market village (the party's first waypoint); a chance to turn the gate-disaster into a base of support, mouths & hands for the relief

The Coronation Reckoning (Random Event: Close A Thread—Create/Trial) — the Regency has summoned the Witan to the Kingsmound; boy-king Hadric to be crowned & the realm's quarrel settled at MIDWINTER, by vote or the sword behind it. The war now has a deadline; every lord (Beorhtric, Halfdan, the Crown, Ranulf) plays for that table
